phylorefs.label: Syntrichia
phylorefs.dwc:scientificNameAuthorship: Mishler, Brent D. and Ekwealor, Jenna T.B. and Nosratinia, Sonia and Brinda, John C. and Jauregui Lazo, Javier and Oliver, Melvin J.
phylorefs.cladeDefinition: The largest crown clade containing Syntrichia ruralis (Hedw.) F. Weber & D. Mohr 1903 but not Syntrichiadelphus flagellaris (Schimp.) Brinda, Jáuregui-Lazo & Mishler 2021, Hennediella heimii (Hedw.) R.H. Zander 1993, Chenia leptophylla (Müll. Hal.) R.H. Zander 1993, or Tortula subulata Hedw. 1801.
